problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation may resolve How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
